case_title: BOOMBOTIX INC VS. FLAT FITTY LAVISH HEADWEAR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOOMBOTIX INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,700.00 FILED BY BOOMBOTIX INC AS TO DEFENDANT FLAT FITTY LAVISH HEADWEAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED JUL-18-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FLAT FITTY LAVISH HEADWEAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LIEF STORER--CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOOMBOTIX INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLAT FITTY LAVISH HEADWEAR $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,800.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-30-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2013 - JUDGMENT.
